messages.content:
You will be given the current section title and the current page_text.
    Your job is to check if the current section starts in the beginning of the given page_text.
    If there are other contents before the current section title,
    then the current section does not start in the beginning of the given page_text.
    If the current section title is the first content in the given page_text,
    then the current section starts in the beginning of the given page_text.

    Note: do fuzzy matching, ignore any space inconsistency in the page_text.

    The given section title is 2025年手游热门广告主营销洞察.
    The given page_text is 84
2025 GLOBAL MOBILE GAME MARKETING TREND INSIGHTS2025年手游
热门广告主营销洞察07
.

    reply format:
    {
        "start_begin": "yes or no" (yes if the section starts in the beginning of the page_text, no otherwise)
    }
    Directly return the final JSON structure. Do not output anything else.

Do not include any thinking field, explanation, or reasoning. Return only the final requested JSON or text.

message.reasoning_content:

."

The section title is "2025年手游热门广告主营销洞察".
Looking at the `page_text`, it starts with "84\n2025 GLOBAL MOBILE GAME MARKETING TREND INSIGHTS2025年手游\n热门广告主营销洞察07\n."
There is content before the section title: "84\n2025 GLOBAL MOBILE GAME MARKETING TREND INSIGHTS2025年手游\n".
Wait, the title is split across lines or combined with other text.
"2025年手游" is at the end of the second line, and "热门广告主营销洞察" is at the beginning of the third line.
But regardless, there is "84\n2025 GLOBAL MOBILE GAME MARKETING TREND INSIGHTS" before it.
So the section does NOT start at the beginning of the page_text.
Therefore, `start_begin` should be "no".

Check carefully:
page_text: "84\n2025 GLOBAL MOBILE GAME MARKETING TREND INSIGHTS2025年手游\n热门广告主营销洞察07\n."
Section title: "2025年手游热门广告主营销洞察"
Is it at the beginning? No, there's "84" and English text before it.
So answer is no.
Format: {"start_begin": "no"}
Done. 
I will output exactly that. 
No extra text.
Check constraints: "Directly return the final JSON structure. Do not output anything else."
Ready. 
Output matches requirement. 
Proceed.
